name: Adobo Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the ground cumin, minced garlic, and lime juice until smooth.
2. Taste the mixture and add pepper to your desired level of spiciness.
3. Place fish (or chicken/meat) in a shallow dish.
4. Pour the marinade over the protein and turn off any remaining marinade into the dish.
5. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour, or longer for best flavor development.
